74122.subject: How does the Anthropic marketing team use Claude Cowork?
74122.body:
The Atlas

Автор: GenAI Works


Автор: GenAI Works

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/how-does-anthropic-marketing-team-use-claude-cowork-genai-works-im7ic?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BCAV5h3ZyQrmdruKvEuYCsA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1QOQSk-A98SIg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq1c3ynq~gi-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq1c3ynq-gi
  
Welcome back! This week is about AI moving from answers to execution. It starts with Anthropic using its own agent to run real marketing work across data, docs, schedules, Slack, Asana and slides. Then Google enters with a model that could make enterprise AI dramatically cheaper to operate. Next, OpenAI makes four moves to push frontier AI deeper into the systems companies already trust. And Reddit becomes one of the most important surfaces in AI search, shaping what ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and Google AI Overviews choose to cite.The takeaway from the four stories is simple. The model alone no longer decides the winner. What decides it is where AI runs, what it costs, which systems it connects to and which sources it trusts. In today's Atlas Newsletter: The vendor turned the product on itself: How Anthropic's marketing team runs a full weekly business review on Cowork, one operator, one morning. The AI bill that scales to zero: Google's Gemma 4 12B runs on your laptop and rewrites the unit economics of frontier AI. OpenAI answered one question four times: AWS, Codex, a life sciences model and a safety play, all pointed at enterprise distribution. Reddit is the page everyone now optimizes for: Why 40% of AI citations trace back to Reddit, and the playbook to get your brand in those threads. PS: Want to share your AI tool or company news with our 14M+ community? Get in touch. How does Anthropic turn Claude Cowork into a marketing operator? Every Sunday at 5 PM, a scheduled task fires. Cowork reads the data warehouse through BigQuery, pulls files from Google Drive, builds the table structure, and writes the prep log. By Monday, the operator opens the app to a working draft with findings already surfaced: A $612M pipeline at 84% to goal. An executive engagement gap in one segment. A reach step-up from spring events. Then one person drives the review. They pick the focus and hand Cowork the sales QBR doc to reconcile against. The agent catches a mismatch before drafting. Then it produces: A v1 review. A proofread version. A branded HTML doc. A Slack post. An Asana task with owner and date. A leadership slide. Research to ship deliverables. One operator. One morning. The detail worth stealing is the posture. Cowork asks clarifying questions, flags risks the operator did not raise, and pushes back instead of agreeing by default. When the sales

74121.subject: Hawks and Hikes
74121.body:
In Context

Автор: J.P. Morgan


Автор: J.P. Morgan

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/hawks-hikes-jpmorgan-lgn3e?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bwu%2BGIzNQQae%2FS0zobsyKAQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3oaZxWLjwRSIg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq1bel3i~lc-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq1bel3i-lc
  
Central bank rhetoric has recently become more hawkish. Could rate hikes be in the cards? How are quantitative investment managers unlocking alpha in the commodities space? Discover why finance leaders are increasingly focusing on liquidity amid a volatile economic environment.      📩 Want more content from In Context? Sign up here to receive weekly insights directly in your inbox. Are rate hikes on the horizon? Macroeconomic conditions are shifting rapidly as the geopolitical landscape evolves. At the start of the year, J.P. Morgan Global Research forecasted that global inflation would remain stable through 2026. In recent weeks, however, inflation concerns have returned to the fore, particularly as energy prices remain elevated due to the ongoing Middle East conflict. “Two recent developments are upending the debate about inflation inertia and the monetary policy path. Firstly, the energy price spike is now raising inflation and generating a sharp squeeze on household purchasing power that could intensify if the Middle East conflict keeps the Strait of Hormuz closed. The risk of a negative growth shock raising unemployment rates is thus high — an outcome that would ultimately prove disinflationary and warrant lower policy rates.” – Bruce Kasman, chief global economist, J.P. Morgan On the other hand, a surge in global goods demand is contributing to inflationary concerns. Global factory output accelerated to an annualized rate (ar) of 3.6% in the first quarter, tracking well above J.P. Morgan Global Research forecasts. In addition, supply bottlenecks in the tech sector, as well as rising import and transportation costs, are putting upward pressure on core goods prices, which are forecast to increase by an annualized rate of 2% this year, compared with 0.9% during 2024–2025. How might central banks respond? See the forecast 🔗 By the numbers 3%   Goods sector cost pressures, tightening labor markets and firm pricing power could push core inflation well above 3%, according to J.P. Morgan Global Research. 40%   Among quantitative investment managers, commodities can account for up to 40% of a long-short portfolio’s allocation — second only to equities. $10.5T The cost of global cybercrime was an estimated $10.5 trillion in 2025, underscoring the importance of fraud prevention technology.   Finding alpha in commodities trading “One thing that’s very different about commodities is

74120.subject: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
74120.body:
The Monthly AI Recap

Автор: Google


Автор: Google

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/latest-ai-news-we-announced-may-2026-google-5naic?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BaPcQE64fQdC5%2FrkjlVRqUw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3RPYlFhg0sSIg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq1a12t9~oo-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq1a12t9-oo
  
At Google I/O 2026, we officially entered the agentic Gemini era with the launch of Gemini 3.5 — which delivers frontier intelligence for agents and coding — and Gemini Omni, our new model that can create anything from any input, starting with video. The Android Show set the stage with the Googlebook, the first laptop designed from the ground up for Gemini Intelligence. We also broadened our personal wellness tools with the new Google Health app and Fitbit Air, and launched an initiative to apply advanced quantum science and AI to the life sciences. Experience Gemini Omni. We announced Gemini Omni, which allows you to combine images, audio, video and text as input and generate high-quality videos grounded in Gemini's real-world knowledge. Simulate real-world places. By combining Project Genie with Street View, we introduced an experimental new way to simulate and explore highly realistic, interactive 3D environments of real-world places right from your browser. Learn how we partner with musical artists. Through a new partnership between Google Flow Music and Believe, we're equipping artists and producers with a creative AI collaborator to help throughout the creation process, from brainstorming lyrics and melodies to putting final touches on a song. Discover what’s possible with Gemini 3.5. We launched our latest family of models combining frontier intelligence with action. With powerful new action-taking capabilities, Gemini 3.5 is built to help you reliably execute complex, multi-step agentic workflows across your apps. Connect with your proactive 24/7 partner. The Gemini app is becoming a more helpful AI assistant, featuring an intuitive new UI, personalized daily briefs and Gemini Spark. Instead of just answering questions, it acts as a proactive helper — managing your inbox, scheduling appointments and anticipating your daily needs in the background. Get more done with our advanced AI models in Search. Our next era for Search introduces new features that bring together the best of the web with the best of AI. We're launching information agents in Search to intelligently work in the background, 24/7. They'll monitor information on your behalf and send detailed updates with links to dive deeper and take action. We’re also bringing Antigravity and the agentic coding capabilities of Gemini 3.5 Flash right into Search, so Search can build generative UI and

After three sellouts, you have another shot for exposure to this quantum innovator

private-header-Jun-04-2026-05-35-18-7551-PM (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VVmT6h6RHg24W6lQ8wD1dkctVW8rPchQ5PY3rSN15bQXR3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3nDMwqGmXXMfYCW6YFvk01Pxl0FW1YykHx3Y1B2CW2rSgtP6YSjycW6z1mL112nMDLV4PJXd4GxSC2W8sQlZq3DClpdW88Yjpp30kcCRW4gD9-54ChbygW4MjL2m7tYfRrW5PdTYt60gF5jW1zJwmM8dlFG6N6Y46gzPKl39W26jSMN7xfmvMW1mrJZW2MLzgDW1JJCf91R_bPtW5mwYfd50W94DW8GCMHt2txz0YW7BcjP94V9F8RW3vHFPp7qnHpXW8CWBNh64Pbh9V9mJBc2GN1RDW19zH744fsKSzW16rV_z594M9wW8Qq6Y890qN0cW3YBtC011R2wNW6-VWwk3_l2WvW4L2xh29jNJQ_f6j7gSF04 )

Hi Oleg,

We’ve launched three offerings for exposure to PsiQuantum. They all sold out.

And since we closed Series PsiQuantum-3 in May, the company has continued making news:

- Signed a $100M LOI with the U.S. Department of Commerce to support domestic manufacturing and scaling of photonic quantum computing technologies.¹
- Opened a research hub at Griffith University in Brisbane, Australia, the first such facility outside of the northern hemisphere.²

Pretty meaningful progress as the company aims to build a 1 million qubit supercomputer, which would shatter the previous record of 6,100 qubits.³

With that kind of momentum (and strong response from our investors), it was a no-brainer to launch Series PsiQuantum-4 (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VVmT6h6RHg24W6lQ8wD1dkctVW8rPchQ5PY3rSN15bQXR3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3nDMwqGmXXMfYCW6YFvk01Pxl0FW1YykHx3Y1B2CW2rSgtP6YSjycW6z1mL112nMDLV4PJXd4GxSC2W8sQlZq3DClpdW88Yjpp30kcCRW4gD9-54ChbygW4MjL2m7tYfRrW5PdTYt60gF5jW1zJwmM8dlFG6N6Y46gzPKl39W26jSMN7xfmvMW1mrJZW2MLzgDW1JJCf91R_bPtW5mwYfd50W94DW8GCMHt2txz0YW7BcjP94V9F8RW3vHFPp7qnHpXW8CWBNh64Pbh9V9mJBc2GN1RDW19zH744fsKSzW16rV_z594M9wW8Qq6Y890qN0cW3YBtC011R2wNW6-VWwk3_l2WvW4L2xh29jNJQ_f6j7gSF04 ) , giving you another shot for exposure to a leader in quantum computing.

74118.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Zcrash
74118.body:
Zcash selloff extends past 50% amid bug disclosure as liquidations top $125 million | Strategy's Saylor says Bitcoin should avoid choosing between 'purity and adoption' as BTC extends losses | Grayscale says bitcoin needs other buyers to find a 'sustainable bottom' amid Strategy BTC sale | JPMorgan, Citi-backed consortium plans to launch tokenized deposit network in early 2027 | CME CEO Duffy says new perpetual futures could be 'disaster waiting to happen' |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Jason Shubnell

Presented by

LMAX ( https://www.theblock.co/lmax?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Friday 🎉 Spot *bitcoin* and *ether* ETFs finally snapped multi-week outflow streaks on Thursday, though analysts ( https://www.theblock.co/post/403805/bitcoin-ether-etfs-end-13-and-17-day-outflow-streaks-as-traders-rotate-into-equity-perps-ahead-of-nfp-analysts?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) said the move reflects a rotation in risk appetite toward equity-index and pre-IPO perpetual futures rather than a broad crypto market recovery as weakness continues.

In today's newsletter, the *Zcash* selloff extends past 50% amid a bug disclosure, *Saylor* says *Bitcoin* should avoid choosing between "purity and adoption," a *JPMorgan* and *Citi* -backed consortium plans to launch a tokenized deposit network, and more.

Meanwhile, *Securitize* clears ( https://www.theblock.co/post/403842/securitize-clears-sec-registration-statement-hurdle-sets-path-to-nyse-listing-as-secz?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) its *SEC* registration statement hurdle, setting a path to an *NYSE* listing as *SECZ*.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*📉 Zcash plunges amid bug disclosure as liquidations top $125 million*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/403791/zcash-selloff-extends-past-50-amid-bug-disclosure-as-liquidations-top-100-million?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Zcash* plunged more than 50% at one point on Friday from Thursday's highs after developers disclosed a critical bug that could have enabled "unlimited" counterfeit *ZEC* minting within the network's Orchard privacy pool.

* Forced liquidations topped $125 million across 25,000 traders, making ZEC the third-most liquidated market over the past 24 hours behind *bitcoin* a

74117.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest - June 5
74117.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-5-oleh-bezuhlyi-pbugf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BHa6HH6EQTqG4i85R%2BneJXg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2fY-MObcyASsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq16gs3p~sg-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq16gs3p-sg
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Crypto is enduring its worst week since July 2024 as Bitcoin crashes toward $61,000, ETFs hemorrhage a record $4.4 billion across 13 straight sessions, and speculative capital rotates aggressively into AI stocks and the SpaceX IPO. 💥Bitcoin Suffers Worst Week Since July 2024 — $3B Liquidated in Two Days Bitcoin plunged to $61,300 before partially recovering, contributing to nearly $3 billion in liquidations over two days. Open interest collapsed 8.5%, put skews are firmly bearish, and the $60,000 strike on Deribit now carries over $1 billion in notional open interest. BTC is now 51% below its October 2025 all-time high of $126,200. Read full story 📉U.S. Bitcoin ETFs Post Record 13-Day, $4.4B Outflow Streak U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs shed another $396.6 million on Wednesday, extending the longest outflow streak on record. BlackRock's IBIT led losses with $342 million in a single session. Total net assets across all funds collapsed from $104.3B on May 15 to $82.8B — a $21.5 billion wipeout in three weeks. See details 🏦Strategy Sells Bitcoin for First Time Since 2022, Triggering Market Panic Michael Saylor's Strategy sold 32 BTC for $2.5 million to cover preferred stock dividend obligations — its first Bitcoin sale since 2022 and only its second ever. The Monday disclosure triggered a major sell-off. Saylor attributed the broader slump to capital rotating into AI, insisting Bitcoin is not "broken." Read full story 📊Citi: ETF Flows Drive 45% of Bitcoin Price Moves — Market Structure Bill Dims Citi analysts found U.S. spot Bitcoin ETF flows explain roughly 45% of weekly BTC price variation, making them the single most critical gauge of institutional demand. With 13 consecutive days of outflows, the bank warned sentiment will remain subdued. Separately, Citi cautioned that prospects for a U.S. crypto market structure bill are now diminishing. See full report 🚀Hyperliquid HYPE Hits All-Time High $75.52 — Only Major Crypto Defying the Selloff Hyperliquid's HYPE token surged to a record $75.52, gaining 180% in 2026 while Bitcoin collapsed. U.S. spot HYPE ETFs, launched May 12, have logged inflows every single session with cumulative net assets reaching $192 million — the only major crypto ETF category still attracting new money. View details ⚖️Ether ETFs Barely End 17-Day Outflow Streak as ETH Nears Critical Sup
